description: A template outlining metadata to be collected for each library in a bulk RNA-seq dataset.

Component.description: A high-level attribute for grouping attributes into templates.
Component.title: Component

alignmentReference.description: The genomic/transcriptomic reference used for performing read alignment against.
enum: 10x Cell Ranger ATAC Human Reference GRCh38 2024-A
10x Human Transcriptome Flex Probe Set v1.0.1
10x Human Transcriptome Flex Probe Set v1.1.0
10x Human Transcriptome Flex Probe Set v2.0
alignmentReference.title: alignmentReference

assay.description: The technology used to generate the data in this file. For multimodal datasets with concomitant profiling of biospecimen select all assays that apply. e.g., the GEX files from a CITE-seq experiment should be labeled with both 'scRNASeq' and 'CITESeq'.
assay.title: assay

biospecimenID.description: A unique identifier assigned to specimens collected from study participants. For multi-specimen data files provide all IDs in a comma-separated list.
biospecimenID.title: biospecimenID

customAlignmentReferenceSynID.description: If a custom alignment reference was used for aligning your reads, then the reference files should be grouped as a zip or tar archive and uploaded to Synapse as metadata. This attribute links the experimental data back to the custom reference files via a Synapse ID. This includes genomomic, transcriptomic, and proteomic reference sequence information as well as 10x Genomics Flex probe sets.
customAlignmentReferenceSynID.title: customAlignmentReferenceSynID

dataCollectionBatch.description: A label indicating batching that occurs during data collection, e.g., collecting data across multiple days.
dataCollectionBatch.title: dataCollectionBatch

demultiplexMethod.description: This attribute indicates the general method that needs to be used to demultiplex multispecimen raw data.
demultiplexMethod.title: demultiplexMethod

libraryID.description: A library label or name, unique within an experiment, used to distinguish sequencing libraries.
libraryID.title: libraryID

libraryPrepMethod.description: Sequencing library preparation method or kit used to create the library. If no commercially available kit was used, please select 'in-house library prep'.
enum: 10x Chromium Next GEM Single Cell 3' v1
10x Chromium Next GEM Single Cell 3' v2
10x Chromium Next GEM Single Cell 3' v3
10x Chromium Next GEM Single Cell 3' v3.1
10x Chromium Next GEM Single Cell 5' v1.1
10x Chromium Next GEM Single Cell 5' v2
10x Chromium Next GEM Single Cell ATAC v1
10x Chromium Next GEM Single Cell ATAC v2
Chromium Next GEM Single Cell ATAC v1.1
NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library
SMART-Seq v4 Ultra Low Input RNA
Takara Human BCR profiling for Illumina
Takara Human TCR profiling for Illumina
Takara Human TCRv2 profiling for Illumina
Takara Human scTCR profiling for Illumina
libraryPrepMethod.title: libraryPrepMethod

nucleicAcidSource.description: The source of the nucleic acid used as input for sequencing library fragments.
nucleicAcidSource.title: nucleicAcidSource

platform.description: The specific version (manufacturer, model, etc.) of a technology that is used to carry out a laboratory or computational experiment. Specify where applicable for experimental data files, else enter 'none'. In most cases only a single label is expected, however multiple selections can be provided in comma-delimited list where applicable e.g., for 10x Genomics fastq files please specify both the 10x instrument and the sequencing platform.
platform.title: platform

sampleProcessingBatch.description: A label indicating batching of sample processing or preparation that occurs prior to data collection.
sampleProcessingBatch.title: sampleProcessingBatch

softwareAndVersion.description: Relevant software and version used to generate the data file.
softwareAndVersion.title: softwareAndVersion

specimenModality.description: Label assigned to experimental data files indicating whether the data contained corresponds to a single or multiple biospecimens
specimenModality.title: specimenModality

totalReads.description: Total number of reads sequenced from the library.
totalReads.title: totalReads

title: BulkRNASeqAssayMetadataTemplate
